title: Vitals
subtitle: Track health readings for your circle — blood pressure, heart rate, glucose, and weight.
errorHint: Check your connection and try again.

delete.title: Delete this reading?
delete.message: This reading will be permanently removed. This can't be undone.

empty.title: No readings yet
empty.hint: Track your loved one's vitals over time so the whole circle can spot trends and share them at the next appointment.
empty.hintReadOnly: Readings logged for this circle will appear here so everyone can follow your loved one's health over time.

validation.valueOutOfRange: That value is outside the expected range.
validation.value2NotAllowed: This reading takes a single value.
validation.invalidUnit: That unit isn't valid for this reading.
validation.invalidDate: Please choose a valid date and time.
validation.recordedAtFuture: The reading time can't be in the future.
validation.notesTooLong: Notes must be 500 characters or fewer.

errors.permissionDenied: You don't have permission to make this change.
errors.saveFailed: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
